user_agents.name: OAI-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Search results in ChatGPT search features
user_agents.scope: Website indexing for ChatGPT search results

user_agents.name: GPTBot
user_agents.purpose: Training data for generative AI foundation models
user_agents.scope: Crawl content for training AI models
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: GPTBot / Disallow: / indicates content should not be used for training

user_agents.name: OAI-AdsBot
user_agents.purpose: Validate safety of web pages submitted as ads on ChatGPT
user_agents.scope: Landing pages of submitted ads only, not for training generative AI models

user_agents.name: ChatGPT-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered requests in ChatGPT and Custom GPTs
user_agents.scope: User-initiated web page visits and GPT Actions, not automatic crawling
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: ChatGPT-User / Disallow: / (though robots.txt may not apply to user-triggered actions)

user_agents.name: ClaudeBot
user_agents.purpose: Collect web content for AI model training and development
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for model development datasets
user_agents.opt_out: Add 'User-agent: ClaudeBot' and 'Disallow: /' to robots.txt; supports Crawl-delay directive

user_agents.name: Claude-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-initiated web access when Claude AI users ask questions
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch for live web content retrieval based on user queries
user_agents.opt_out: Add 'User-agent: Claude-User' and 'Disallow: /' to robots.txt to prevent retrieval in response to user queries

user_agents.name: Claude-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search result quality and relevance for users
user_agents.scope: Web crawl to index content and enhance search result accuracy and relevance
user_agents.opt_out: Add 'User-agent: Claude-SearchBot' and 'Disallow: /' to robots.txt to prevent search indexing

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: General web crawling for search indexes and products
user_agents.scope: Google Search, Discover, Google Images, Google Video, Google News

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Image
user_agents.purpose: Image-specific crawling for search and discovery products
user_agents.scope: Google Images, Discover, Google Video, search image features

user_agents.name: Googlebot-Video
user_agents.purpose: Video-specific crawling for search and discovery products
user_agents.scope: Video-related Google Search features and video-dependent products

user_agents.name: Googlebot-News
user_agents.purpose: News content crawling for Google News product
user_agents.scope: Google News product, news.google.com, Google News app

user_agents.name: Storebot-Google
user_agents.purpose: Shopping product crawling for Google Shopping surfaces
user_agents.scope: Google Shopping, Shopping tab in Google Search

user_agents.name: Google-InspectionTool
user_agents.purpose: Search testing and validation for developer tools
user_agents.scope: Rich Result Test, URL inspection in Search Console

user_agents.name: GoogleOther
user_agents.purpose: Generic product team crawling for internal R&D
user_agents.scope: Various product teams, one-off crawls, internal research

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Image
user_agents.purpose: Generic image URL fetching optimized for internal uses
user_agents.scope: Publicly accessible image URLs for product teams

user_agents.name: GoogleOther-Video
user_agents.purpose: Generic video URL fetching optimized for internal uses
user_agents.scope: Publicly accessible video URLs for product teams

user_agents.name: Google-CloudVertexBot
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for Vertex AI Agents
user_agents.scope: Content crawls requested by site owners for Vertex AI Agents

user_agents.name: Google-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Training data for Gemini models and grounding in Gemini Apps
user_agents.scope: Content for training future Gemini models and search grounding

user_agents.name: PerplexityBot
user_agents.purpose: Surface and link websites in search results on Perplexity
user_agents.scope: Search indexing for Perplexity search results; not used for AI training data collection
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow PerplexityBot in robots.txt file; block published IP ranges from https://www.perplexity.com/perplexitybot.json

user_agents.name: Perplexity-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user-triggered web page fetches for answering user questions
user_agents.scope: User-requested page visits to provide accurate answers; generally ignores robots.txt rules since user-triggered
user_agents.opt_out: Control via WAF or network-level blocking using published IP ranges from https://www.perplexity.com/perplexity-user.json

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Powers search technology integrated into Spotlight, Siri, and Safari
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for search indexing and content discovery across Apple ecosystem
user_agents.opt_out: Disallow in robots.txt to prevent crawling; allows opt-out from AI training via Applebot-Extended

user_agents.name: Applebot-Extended
user_agents.purpose: Determines how Applebot data is used to train Apple foundation models for generative AI
user_agents.scope: Does not crawl webpages; only metadata evaluation of already-crawled content
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Applebot-Extended / Disallow: / in robots.txt to opt-out of generative AI training

user_agents.name: iTMS
user_agents.purpose: Crawls content registered on Apple Podcasts
user_agents.scope: Podcast-specific URLs on Apple Podcasts; does not follow robots.txt
user_agents.opt_out: Does not respect robots.txt; iTMS-specific crawling cannot be controlled via standard directives

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAgent
user_agents.purpose: Training foundation AI models and improving products by indexing content directly
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for AI training and product improvement

user_agents.name: FacebookExternalHit
user_agents.purpose: Crawl content shared on Meta's family of apps (Facebook, Instagram, Messenger)
user_agents.scope: Crawls shared links to gather title, description, and thumbnail image metadata
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: facebookexternalhit / Disallow: / (in robots.txt; may bypass for security checks)

user_agents.name: Meta-WebIndexer
user_agents.purpose: Improve Meta AI search result quality and enhance relevance of Meta AI responses
user_agents.scope: Web crawl to index content for Meta AI search and citation purposes

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalAds
user_agents.purpose: Improve advertising and other business-related products and services
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for advertising optimization and business product improvement

user_agents.name: Meta-ExternalFetcher
user_agents.purpose: Fetch individual links at user request to evaluate and improve agentic AI capabilities
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetch to help AI navigate websites and complete tasks for users
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: meta-externalfetcher / Disallow: / (in robots.txt; may bypass for user-requested fetches)

user_agents.name: Bingbot
user_agents.purpose: Search index crawling for Bing search results
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for Bing search indexing

user_agents.name: Copilot-User
user_agents.purpose: User-triggered fetch for Copilot live web responses
user_agents.scope: Fetches web content when Copilot users request real-time information

user_agents.name: Copilot
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for Copilot AI models
user_agents.scope: Web crawl for training data, distinct from search indexing

user_agents.name: AdIdxBot
user_agents.purpose: Ad indexing and advertisement-related crawling
user_agents.scope: Crawls web content for ad indexing purposes

user_agents.name: Amazonbot
user_agents.purpose: Improve products and services, train Amazon AI models
user_agents.scope: General web crawl for product improvement and AI training
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amazonbot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; respects robots meta tags (noarchive, noindex, none)

user_agents.name: Amzn-SearchBot
user_agents.purpose: Improve search experiences in Amazon products and services
user_agents.scope: Content indexing for search experiences like Alexa and Rufus
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-SearchBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt; respects robots meta tags (noarchive, noindex, none)

user_agents.name: Amzn-User
user_agents.purpose: Support user actions requiring up-to-date information for Alexa queries
user_agents.scope: User-triggered fetches for live web information to answer customer questions
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: Amzn-User / Disallow: / in robots.txt; respects robots meta tags (noarchive, noindex, none)

user_agents.name: CCBot/2.0
user_agents.purpose: Web crawling for Common Crawl dataset creation and research analysis
user_agents.scope: General web crawl of the internet for data collection and archival purposes
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: CCBot/1.0
user_agents.purpose: Legacy web crawling for Common Crawl dataset creation
user_agents.scope: General web crawl (older version, may still be in use)
user_agents.opt_out: User-agent: CCBot / Disallow: / in robots.txt file

user_agents.name: Googlebot
user_agents.purpose: Search indexing and AI-related crawler requests

user_agents.name: Applebot
user_agents.purpose: Apple's web crawler for search and AI applications

user_agents.name: OpenAI crawler
user_agents.purpose: Training data collection for AI models

user_agents.name: AI agent crawlers (general)
user_agents.purpose: Non-human consumers of brand information and agentic AI services

user_agents.name: Copilot Actions
user_agents.purpose: Microsoft's agentic automation feature for user-triggered actions
user_agents.scope: Uses standard Edge or Chromium browser user agents without distinct bot signal
